MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-29-2020 Vacated

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Approval Of Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Kevin Woodall, Esq. 415-413-4629 for Plaintiff.
No other Appearamce.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court share its views. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF OMAR ALI's Unopposed Motion For Approval Of Paga Settlement.

Granted. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Approval Of Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-12-2020 Continued To Aug-25-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF OMAR ALI's Unopposed Motion For Approval Of PAGA Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification only as to the continuance date. The matter is continued on the court's own motion. Based on the parties' email to the court indicating their availability, the matter is continued to August 25, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
